issue_summary: UH switch to SpanCollector API. Better accuracy. * Use the filtered freq in position sensitive terms (better scores) * Refactored UH's OffsetsEnum * Improved test randomization in TestUnifiedHighlighter & MTQ
code_after: public abstract BytesRef getTerm() throws IOException;

   * even after we move to next position. */
